rationale: The proposed change concerns the residence homestead exemption under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §37.0151 governs school reporting of assault or harassment to law enforcement. The two provisions are unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: The principal of a public primary or secondary school, or a person designated by the principal under Subsection (c), may make a report to any school district police department
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this school safety reporting statute.
